title: Metaprogramming Mod SDK contracts
description: Canonical relationships between the meta compilation block (language law), the Beskid.Compiler.* Mod SDK surface, the reference compiler host, and downstream semantic/codegen stages.

nodes.label: meta block (language)
nodes.description: Declarative capture, process, emit orchestration; semantics under language-meta.

nodes.label: Meta Project.proj
nodes.description: project.type Meta wires manifest into meta host event piping and entry modules.

nodes.label: Syntax domain model
nodes.description: Parsed program and syntax items produced before meta execution; feeds discovery and Mod SDK facades.

nodes.label: Beskid.Compiler.* facades
nodes.description: Typed syntax, queries, diagnostics, and emitter surfaces exposed to compile-time Beskid modules.

nodes.label: Host bridge
nodes.description: Reference compiler-owned execution, capability injection, and sandboxing for meta code.

nodes.label: Incremental graph
nodes.description: Invalidation, caching, and deterministic replay for meta outputs and synthesized members.

nodes.label: Semantic pipelines
nodes.description: Resolution, typing, and staged rules reconciled after meta contributions are merged.

nodes.label: Lowering / codegen
nodes.description: HIR and backend lowering consume the final merged program shape.

edges.label: registers
edges.description: Resolution passes Meta projects to the host for event subscriptions and budgets.

edges.label: declares
edges.description: Meta projects contain meta items that declare capture, process, and emit pipelines.

edges.label: anchors in
edges.description: meta blocks are discovered from the syntax model of the compilation under construction.

edges.label: materializes
edges.description: The host projects syntax into Beskid.Compiler.Syntax and related facades.

edges.label: invoked under
edges.description: Mod SDK calls are serviced by the host bridge with explicit capability boundaries.

edges.label: records
edges.description: Contributions and reads are registered for incremental invalidation and replay.

edges.label: feeds
edges.description: After a consistent meta round, semantic pipelines consume the augmented program.

edges.label: lowers
edges.description: Typed, resolved output continues through lowering unchanged by this contract slice.
